context: Tests whether the agent calculates sample size using the correct statistical formula with specific z-score magic numbers, implements server-side variant assignment using MD5 hashing of experimentId:userId with the correct bucketing formula, and wires up the middleware with proper user ID resolution fallback chain.

checklist.name: Sample size function exists
checklist.description: A function named calculateRequiredSampleSize (or equivalent) is defined and accepts parameters for baseline conversion rate, minimum detectable effect, statistical power, and significance level

checklist.name: zAlpha value
checklist.description: Uses zAlpha = 1.96 (not 1.645 or 2.0) as the z-score for the alpha/significance level in the sample size formula

checklist.name: zBeta for 80% power
checklist.description: Uses zBeta = 0.842 when statistical power is 0.80

checklist.name: MD5 hash for assignment
checklist.description: Uses MD5 (createHash('md5') or equivalent) — not SHA256, SHA1, or another algorithm — for variant bucketing

checklist.name: Hash input format
checklist.description: Hashes the combined string of experimentId and userId in the format 'experimentId:userId' (colon-separated, experiment first)

checklist.name: Bucket normalization divisor
checklist.description: Divides the parsed integer from the first 8 hex characters of the hash by 0xffffffff (not 0xffffffff + 1, not 2^32) to produce the bucket value

checklist.name: First 8 hex chars
checklist.description: Uses only the first 8 hexadecimal characters of the MD5 hash digest for bucket calculation (not more, not fewer)

checklist.name: Server-side middleware
checklist.description: Implements an Express-style middleware function that populates req.experiments with variant assignments for all active experiments

checklist.name: User ID fallback chain
checklist.description: Resolves user identity using a fallback chain: customerId first, then anonymousId, then a getOrCreateAnonymousId function — NOT session ID alone

checklist.name: README example output
checklist.description: README.md contains a numeric result for the sample size calculation with baseline=0.031, MDE=0.004, power=0.80, significance=0.05

checklist.name: TypeScript types
checklist.description: Uses TypeScript interfaces or type definitions for the sample size parameters and the Experiment object

checklist.name: Weights sum to 1.0
checklist.description: Experiment variant weights (if demonstrated) are documented or shown to sum to 1.0
